components.name: Alert
components.description: Status-based alert with icon, title, body, and optional dismiss. Glass and glow support.

components.name: Background
components.description: Full-page background layer with switchable presets (dark, gradient, iridescent, etc.). Use BackgroundSwitcher to let users pick a background.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Inline label with variant colors or status colors. Optional glass surface.

components.name: Button
components.description: Button with 6 variants, 5 sizes. Optional glass surface and glow effect.

components.name: Card
components.description: Container with optional glass surface, glow, and hover effects. Compose with CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter.

components.name: Icon
components.description: Renders icons by name. Uses Phosphor icons by default -- pass any icon name like

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input with size variants, status colors, label, helper text, error messages, and optional glass surface with glow on focus.

components.name: Sidebar
components.description: Navigation sidebar with sections, items, header, and footer. Preline-inspired with active state indicators and glass support.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input with size, status, label, and optional glass surface with glow on focus.

components.name: ThemeSwitcher
components.description: Compact theme control with preset dots and dark/light mode toggle. Uses global theme state.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Switch toggle with size variants, label, and optional glass surface. Keyboard accessible.
